methodsAttempted.query: site:reading.ac.uk University of Reading generative AI artificial intelligence assessment policy students
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned official University of Reading student guidance, CQSD assessment PDFs, an academic-integrity annex, and a LibGuides policy page.

methodsAttempted.query: site:reading.ac.uk University of Reading AI data protection Copilot generative AI staff guidance
methodsAttempted.notes: A follow-up Firecrawl search returned HTTP 402, so discovery pivoted to public web search and direct official HTTP/PDF fetches.
Official search results exposed CQSD teaching guidance, student assessment guidance, a staff AI tools privacy PDF, an academic misconduct page, and related PDFs.
Direct HTTP fetches were used for official HTML pages and PDFs; raw pages and PDFs were kept outside the repository.

artifacts.summary: Official University of Reading discovery found public GenAI student assessment guidance, a CQSD assessment-categories PDF, a Section 9 academic-integrity annex on GenAI misuse, a Study Advice LibGuide policy page, and a staff AI tools privacy PDF. Duplicate, stale, news, and student-blog sources were rejected and not used as claim evidence.

stopConditions: Stop after verified official University of Reading sources support narrow claim candidates.
Do not use search snippets, third-party summaries, news-only pages, or student blogs as claim evidence.
Do not bypass login gates or robots restrictions.

artifacts.claimText: University of Reading assessment guidance uses a three-category GenAI framework: Category 1 prohibits GenAI use, Category 2 permits GenAI as a tool to aid development of the assessment, and Category 3 actively encourages and evaluates GenAI use.
artifacts.normalizedValue: three GenAI assessment categories: Category 1 prohibited; Category 2 permitted to aid development of the assessment; Category 3 encouraged and evaluated

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow staged candidate tied to the official CQSD assessment PDF; not canonical and not human reviewed.
Approved as a narrow staged candidate based on official student guidance; no broader rule is inferred beyond the assignment-brief silence point.
Approved as a narrow source-backed student-guidance statement about DeepSeek on University devices and networks.
Approved as a narrow Study Advice LibGuide statement about checking with the module convenor for assessed work.
Approved as a narrow claim tied to the official Section 9 annex; wording is limited to the explicit cheating statement.
Approved as a staff-guidance privacy claim limited to M365 Copilot Chat and personal or personal sensitive data.

artifacts.title: University of Reading AI Policy Staged Source Review
artifacts.summary: Official University of Reading sources support staged candidate claims about a three-category GenAI assessment framework, a default Category 1 interpretation when an assignment brief is silent, student advice to check the module convenor for assessed work, DeepSeek being blocked on University devices or networks, GenAI misuse being described as a form of cheating, and staff privacy guidance for M365 Copilot Chat. Duplicate, stale, news-only, and student-blog pages were not used as claim evidence.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Firecrawl discovery was partially available: one search succeeded, then a follow-up Firecrawl search returned HTTP 402, so direct official HTTP/PDF fetches were used for verification.
The CQSD overview page was used for discovery context, not direct claim evidence.
The student-life blog and research-news page are official Reading pages but were rejected as non-primary policy evidence.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
